globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://accounts.google.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; connect-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:;
